title: Angels Fall First
notes: cannot install microsoft .net, will not start at all because of this, maybe more issues too.

On first run, the game will stall during .NET installation. This game does not even use .NET as mentioned by the developers. Upon removing .NET install from redist folder, the game just does not start.
title: Angels Fall First

notes:
As the other reviews show it it stalls on installation with installing .NET 4.0. If you install .NET 4.0 through Winetricks into the prefix Steam has for Angles Fall First, the rest of the installation work fine and the game launches and runs (I haven't tested multiplayer, but I played a game with bots with no issues). 

Steps:
1. Install winetricks if not already
2. Find the wine prefix for Angels Fall First (probably /home/<your user name>/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/367270/pfx
3. In a terminal run "WINEPREFIX=/home/<your user name>/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/367270/pfx winetricks"
4. Choose "Select the default wine prefix"
5. Choose "Install a Windows DLL or Component"
6. Scroll down and choose "dotnet40"
7. Install. I got a lot of warning messages (and some errors) because it's meant for 32-bit wine and not 64 bit. Just hit okay through everything; it worked for me.
8. Launch Angels Fall First. It will display an error saying "Unable to find a version of the runtime to run this application". Click it anyway; it will install some other software. Finally the game will launch. 
9. Enjoy!
title: Angels Fall First

notes: see other entry about manually installing .NET 4.0, it works fine after that
title: Angels Fall First

notes: After dotnet installed as per tweak below, it's perfect.
